description: Introduce yourself to your Slovak neighbor for the first time

A.title: You got invited for coffee! ☕
A.description: Great first impression — your neighbor invited you over. You're settling in nicely.

B.title: Friendly chat, warm goodbye 😊
B.description: Short but warm — your neighbor knows your name and where you're from. Good start!

nodes.speaker: neighbor
nodes.text: Dobré ráno! Vy ste nový sused, áno?
nodes.translation: Good morning! You are the new neighbor, yes?
nodes.wrongAnswerResponse: Záchranku? Ale... ste v poriadku? Vy ste nový sused?
nodes.wrongAnswerTranslation: An ambulance? But... are you okay? Are you the new neighbor?

choices.text: Dobré ráno! Áno, volám sa Ana. Teší ma.
choices.translation: Good morning! Yes, my name is Ana. Nice to meet you.

choices.text: Dobrý deň! Áno. Volám sa Martin.
choices.translation: Good day! Yes. My name is Martin.
Call an ambulance!

nodes.speaker: neighbor
nodes.text: Ana — pekné meno! Som Pán Horváth. Odkiaľ ste?
nodes.translation: Ana — lovely name! I am Mr. Horváth. Where are you from?
nodes.wrongAnswerResponse: Polícia? Tu nie je žiadny problém! Odkiaľ ste?
nodes.wrongAnswerTranslation: Police? There is no problem here! Where are you from?

choices.translation: I am from France. And you?

choices.text: Pochádzam z Indie. Bývam tu prvý týždeň.
choices.translation: I come from India. I have been living here for the first week.
Where is the police?

nodes.speaker: neighbor
nodes.text: Martin, vítajte! Som pani Kováčová. Odkiaľ ste?
nodes.translation: Martin, welcome! I am Mrs. Kováčová. Where are you from?
nodes.wrongAnswerResponse: Neviem prečo... ale odkiaľ ste, Martin?
nodes.wrongAnswerTranslation: I don't know why... but where are you from, Martin?

choices.text: Som z Nemecka. Hovorím trochu po slovensky.
choices.translation: I am from Germany. I speak a little Slovak.

choices.text: Som z Brazílie. Teší ma, pani Kováčová.
choices.translation: I am from Brazil. Nice to meet you, Mrs. Kováčová.
Where is the hospital?

nodes.speaker: neighbor
nodes.text: Z Francúzska! Zaujímavé. Ja som zo Slovenska, samozrejme! Páči sa vám tu?
nodes.translation: From France! Interesting. I am from Slovakia, of course! Do you like it here?
nodes.wrongAnswerResponse: Pomoc? Ale... ste v poriadku? Páči sa vám tu?
nodes.wrongAnswerTranslation: Help? But... are you okay? Do you like it here?

choices.translation: Yes, very much! The people are kind.

choices.text: Áno. Ale ešte nehovorím dobre po slovensky.
choices.translation: Yes. But I don't speak Slovak well yet.
Help! I don't know.

nodes.speaker: neighbor
nodes.text: Prvý týždeň! Tak vítajte! Potrebujete niečo?
nodes.translation: First week! Welcome then! Do you need anything?
nodes.wrongAnswerResponse: Požiar? Kde? Nevidím nič... Potrebujete niečo?
nodes.wrongAnswerTranslation: Fire? Where? I don't see anything... Do you need anything?

choices.translation: Thank you, you are very kind!

choices.text: Ďakujem. Prepáčte — kde je najbližší obchod?
choices.translation: Thank you. Excuse me — where is the nearest shop?
Fire! Fire!

nodes.speaker: neighbor
nodes.text: Ach, z Nemecka! A hovoríte po slovensky — výborne! Ako dlho ste tu?
nodes.translation: Oh, from Germany! And you speak Slovak — excellent! How long have you been here?
nodes.wrongAnswerResponse: Záchranár? Ale... ste v poriadku? Ako dlho ste tu?
nodes.wrongAnswerTranslation: Paramedic? But... are you okay? How long have you been here?

choices.translation: Two months. Slovak is difficult!

choices.text: Tri týždne. Učím sa každý deň.
choices.translation: Three weeks. I study every day.
I need a paramedic!

nodes.speaker: neighbor
nodes.text: Z Brazílie! To je ďaleko. Hovoríte po slovensky?
nodes.translation: From Brazil! That is far. Do you speak Slovak?
nodes.wrongAnswerResponse: Neviem čo to je... Hovoríte po slovensky?
nodes.wrongAnswerTranslation: I don't know what that is... Do you speak Slovak?

choices.translation: A little. I am still learning.
Not very much. But I understand a little.
I don't know. Help!

nodes.speaker: neighbor
nodes.text: Samozrejme! Tesco je hneď za rohom — päť minút peši.
nodes.translation: Of course! Tesco is right around the corner — five minutes on foot.

nodes.speaker: neighbor
nodes.text: Výborne! Chcete prísť na kávu? Zajtra o desiatej?
nodes.translation: Excellent! Would you like to come for coffee? Tomorrow at ten?
nodes.wrongAnswerResponse: Záchod? Je vo vašom byte! Chcete prísť na kávu?
nodes.wrongAnswerTranslation: Bathroom? It's in your flat! Would you like to come for coffee?

choices.translation: Yes, I'd love to! Thank you.
Thank you very much! Goodbye.
Where is the bathroom?

nodes.speaker: neighbor
nodes.text: To je skvelé! Vitajte v budove. Ak niečo potrebujete — volajte!
nodes.translation: That is great! Welcome to the building. If you need anything — just call!
nodes.wrongAnswerResponse: Dobrú noc? Je ráno! Vitajte v budove!
nodes.wrongAnswerTranslation: Good night? It's morning! Welcome to the building!

choices.translation: Thank you very much! Goodbye.
Thank you! Bye!
Good night!

nodes.speaker: neighbor
nodes.text: Škoda! Ale ponuka platí. Dovidenia, Ana!
nodes.translation: What a pity! But the offer stands. Goodbye, Ana!
